eas_text: A civil authority has issued A BLUE ALERT for the following counties or areas: Missouri; at 03:37 PM ON FEB 23, 2026 Effective until 03:52 PM FEB 24, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
WANTED FOR LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICER KILLED OR SERIOUSLY INJURED IN LINE OF DUTY ON MONDAY, 02/23/2026 AT 03:50 PM  AT  U S 160 ,  HIGHLANDVILLE, MISSOURI

SUSPECT VEHICLE IS A WHITE 2001 CHEVROLET SILVERADO EXTENDED CAB BEARING MISSOURI REGISTRATION '9' 'M' 'G','X' '3' '6'.  
VEHICLE HAS SILVER BRUSH GUARD, RUSTED ROOF, BLACK BODY TRIM, TINTED REAR WINDOWS AND A THREE BALL HITCH. 
VEHICLE/SUSPECT LAST SEEN SOUTHBOUND U S-160 FROM RT HH IN CHRISTIAN COUNTY. 

SUSPECT VEHICLE WAS SEEN IN THE AREA OF FATAL SHOOTING INVOLVING A CHRISTIAN COUNTY DEPUTY . 

IF LOCATED, CONTACT YOUR LOCAL LAW ENFORCEMENT OR CALL 9 1 1.
